'''âk-d-z-g''' ('''kakadzegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:laager|laager]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-d-z-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:laager|laager]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-d-z-g
|-
! Lemma
| kakadzegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikadzegoko|thikadzegoko]] || [[word:jikadzegoko|jikadzegoko]] || [[word:shikadzegoko|shikadzegoko]] || [[word:kikadzegoko|kikadzegoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
